title: Crispy Bao Snaps
description: A simple and crunchy snack made with bao and snappy ingredients, perfect for a quick bite.
instructions: 1. Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. Cut the bao into small pieces and set aside.
3. When the oil is hot, add the snappy pieces and fry until crispy.
4. Remove the snappy pieces from the oil and set aside.
5. Add the bao pieces to the oil and fry until crispy and golden brown.
6. Remove the bao pieces from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
7. Sprinkle the crispy bao with salt to taste.
8. Serve the crispy bao snaps immediately and enjoy!
